_schema: sector_heatmap_history v1 — Rotation Radar 'Sector Heat Map' feed, which replaced the ETF net-flow format on 2026-06-10. One snapshot per post. 'date' = the trading session the map covers; 'scan' = the feed's scan label (e.g. EOD). 'market' = cap-weighted move of the whole universe (R3000 + S&P 500), in percent. 'sectors' = each sector's cap-weighted move (the feed's 'sector score'), in percent, ordered best→worst exactly as the feed lists them. The per-stock heat-map tiles are an image only and are NOT transcribed here.
_rules: Only confirmed Rotation Radar Bot feed numbers. Append-only — never edit or delete a committed snapshot. Never invent or carry-forward a value. Copy every percentage exactly as shown (no rounding). Sector names are kept as the feed displays them. The previous ETF-flow store lives in rotation_history.json and is preserved unchanged; this is an additional store for the new format.
